description_long: This object is a retro gaming setup featuring a boxy CRT television, a classic game console resembling a Nintendo 64, two wired controllers, and several game cartridges. The television has a thick, angular casing with a glass screen and visible ventilation grilles on the side. The game console is rectangular with rounded edges, cartridge slot on top, and is connected to the TV via cables. The controllers are ergonomically shaped with multiple buttons and joysticks, and the game cartridges are small, rectangular, and stackable. The entire setup is arranged as if ready for use, with cables loosely connecting the components. The materials appear to be primarily plastic, glass, and some metal for internal components.
description: A retro gaming setup with a CRT television, classic game console, two wired controllers, and game cartridges, all connected and ready for play.
description_view_0: Front view showing the CRT TV screen, game console, two controllers, and game cartridges clearly laid out.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the CRT TV, the back of the console, and the scattered cartridges.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel of the TV, the console from behind, and the arrangement of cables.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view focusing on the TV's sloped back, the console, and the controllers spread apart.
